name: Remnant Clause
specialty: Skilled in navigating the chaotic rifts, offering a unique ability to traverse and salvage valuable relics from the tears in reality

members.name: Serafina Vale
members.note: A stern woman with a scarred face, rumored to have once been a high-ranking member of the Iron Fang Consortium before turning rogue

members.name: Thorne Stonebreaker
members.note: A burly dwarf with a missing eye, known for his brutal efficiency in combat and his reluctance to talk about his past

members.name: Elara Windsong
members.note: A slender elf with a mystical aura, whispered to have made a pact with the Serpent Choir, providing her with otherworldly powers

members.name: Kyra Swiftfoot
members.note: A cunning cat-woman, she's known for her silver tongue and her ability to charm even the toughest targets, despite her young age

visual: Clad in leather armor and armed with a mix of exotic weapons, they move through the Undercity with a purposeful stride, their eyes always scanning for potential opportunities or threats
reputation_note: Despite their affiliation with the Adventurers Guild, the Remnant Clause is a crew that's shrouded in mystery and intrigue, earning them both respect and fear from the denizens of the Undercity
